ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motor_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the event */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The type of sequence (open, close, emergency) */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor involved in the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "created_date_int" INTEGER /* Integer representation of the created date for sorting */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the motor is installed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was initiated */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device ID from which the event was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_events_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motors ("motor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motors" (
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor */,
  "motor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the motor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the motor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the motor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the motor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the motor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the motor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the motor is installed */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line the motor is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Description of the event type (e.g., open, close, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event type */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the event type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
